description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on push to the default branch and on pull requests to the default branch. Run four ubuntu-latest jobs in parallel: lint-docs, lint-code, lint-style, and test. Each job checks out the code, sets up a specific Python version, installs tox, and then runs a tox command. The test job runs on multiple Python versions, while the others run on Python 3.8.
